_infoText: 開服紀念招募
_detailText:
All 成員 於 開服紀念招募 are 的 rarities R 與 above.
1 招募 can be performed 透過 using 300 愛心寶石.
10 招募s can be performed 透過 using 3,000 愛心寶石 與 guarantees at least one 成員 的 稀有度 SR 或 above.
1 paid 招募 can be performed just 一旦 each day 透過 using 150 付費愛心寶石.

If 成員 that has already been recruited is 招募ed，they will automatically be 轉換 至 螢光棒.
*Converted 螢光棒 are directly added 至 你的items instead 的 being sent 至 present box.
*If you have already reached item limit 為 螢光棒，they will be sent 至 present box.
* number 的 螢光棒 obtained will 取決於 on 稀有度 的 成員.
- UR: 500
- SR: 50
- R: 20

Also，you will obtain 開服紀念招募 points according 至 number 的 成員 that appear.
招募 points obtained can be exchanged 為 成員，items，與 more at 交換 shop.
招募 points that can be obtained 於 開服紀念招募 can also be obtained at following 招募:
- 保證 UR！開服紀念招募

招募 points that are not exchanged 期間 招募 期間 will automatically be 轉換 至 技能筆記 (M) 當 招募 ends.
*Converted 技能筆記 (M) 將直接加入你的道具中 instead 的 being sent 至 present box.
*If you have already reached item limit 為 技能筆記 (M)，they will be sent 至 present box.

_infoText: Global Launch SP 招募 ~Set 1~
_detailText:
All 成員 於 Global Launch SP 招募 ~Set 1~ are 的 rarities R 與 above.
1 招募 can be performed 透過 using 300 愛心寶石.
10 招募s can be performed 透過 using 3,000 愛心寶石 與 guarantees at least one 成員 的 稀有度 SR 或 above.
1 paid 招募 can be performed just 一旦 each day 透過 using 150 付費愛心寶石.

If 成員 that has already been recruited is 招募ed，they will automatically be 轉換 至 螢光棒.
*Converted 螢光棒 are directly added 至 你的items instead 的 being sent 至 present box.
*If you have already reached item limit 為 螢光棒，they will be sent 至 present box.
* number 的 螢光棒 obtained will 取決於 on 稀有度 的 成員.
- UR: 500
- SR: 50
- R: 20

Also，you will obtain 招募 Points [Global Launch SP 招募 ~Set 1~] according 至 number 的 成員 that appear.
招募 points obtained can be exchanged 為 成員，items，與 more at 交換 shop.

招募 points that are not exchanged 期間 招募 期間 will automatically be 轉換 至 技能筆記 (M) 當 招募 ends.
*Converted 技能筆記 (M) 將直接加入你的道具中 instead 的 being sent 至 present box.
*If you have already reached item limit 為 技能筆記 (M)，they will be sent 至 present box.
